heroHeadline: Nvidia CEO: DeepSeek on Huawei Chips Would Be 'Horrible' for US
heroSubtitle: Jensen Huang warns DeepSeek AI running on Huawei chips would be catastrophic for US competitiveness; US exempts smartphones, computers, and chips from 145% China tariffs (still 20% fentanyl levy); DeepSeek V4 expected late April exclusively on Huawei Ascend 950PR — a potential AI self-sufficiency milestone
footerNote: Data sourced from MIIT, BIS, Bloomberg, FT, SCMP, CSET, Nikkei Asia, TechInsights, DeepSeek, Huawei Annual Reports, TrendForce, US Trade Representative, CBP, China MOFCOM
